style_effects: Gentle, translucent water droplets cling to Venusaur's leafy skin, drifting upward like slow-motion bubbles. A soft, ethereal blue light emanates from its pores, casting shimmering ripples across its body and reflecting off the calm, still water surface around it. The aura glows with a cool, liquid luminescence, casting a serene, calming glow in the surrounding misty atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
